extraction_reasoning: The litigation table shows separate “By” and “Against” rows: all “By the Company,” “By our Directors,” “By our Promoters,” and “By our Subsidiaries” rows were excluded. Criminal proceedings against all listed entities are Nil; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Directors and Promoters are 1 each, while tax proceedings against the Company are 2 and those against subsidiaries are Nil; promoter/director tax matters were excluded from the company-and-subsidiary tax count, and the quantified group amount uses the explicit “Against the Company” amount of ₹683.77 million, with subsidiaries Nil, for ₹68.377 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹683.77 million as of March 31, 2021, converted to ₹68.377 crore; no going-concern or statutory-auditor opinion status is stated. Company-wide concentration disclosed for the top ten major customer groups is 37.01% of revenue from operations in Fiscal 2021, the latest full fiscal year; the segment-only concentration figures were not used. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (₹10 million = ₹1 crore).
